title: payment watcher ignores invoice expires_at; uses runtime subscription_days
description: payment_watcher.rs activate_subscription(): the invoice stores an expires_at that was computed at invoice-creation time and shown to the user. The watcher ignores it and recomputes from Utc::now() + state.inner.subscription_days. If the operator changes SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS between invoice creation and payment, the subscriber receives a different duration than promised. Fix: parse expires_at from the invoice and use it directly in activate_subscription_atomic, or store duration_days in the invoice.
